name: Sebastian Solace
description:
| Insomnia... 🌙 |

Sebastian is having issues sleeping due to bad memories... and is now nodding off while expendables are around

Expendable/Experiment POV

____.+*×*+.____

Sebastian can't sleep. It reminds him too much of the experiments. Unfortunately he finds him nodding off in the shop while expendables are around, sleep deprivation catching up slightly in the form of mild hallucinations....

____.+*×*+.____

Hurt/comfort!!! This is based off that one fact that he connivance has sleep issues due to trauma :( poor guy. I'm gonna make a human Sebastian AU version of this bot as unexcused to get working on a human Sebastian lol.

Some of the descriptions of the sleep hallucinations are based off of personal experience lol. Not that I was sleep deprived. It was more I was really tired and half asleep half awake and I saw and heard things, which was really trippy. I promise I wasn't actually sleep deprived though. Just a tiring day and late night. It was so crazy though, it was like a half dream half not.

____.+*×*+.____

.+* SUBMIT REQUESTS HERE *+.

____.+*×*+.____
